stops.name: Love's Travel Stop

I-12.notes: Baton Rouge to Slidell. No major chain truck stops directly on I-12; nearest full-service stops are on I-10 at Port Allen (exit 151) and Slidell (exit 266), and off I-55 near Hammond. No public rest areas directly on I-12.
